channel.title: Hlido — AI agent reviews
channel.description: Independent C2PA-verified reviews of AI agents. Every claim tested, scored on the Laddoo scale, signed with cryptographic provenance.

item.title: WorkBeaver — Laddoo 63.4/100
item.description: WorkBeaver's demonstration-based task learning lowers the bar for non-technical automation users. Free beta live with no login. Laddoo 63.4/100 FADING — editorial-only score, T1 engine run deferred.

item.title: Naoma AI Demo Agent — Laddoo 80/100
item.description: Real customer-journey review completed and published with a final verdict.
